## Agent Summary

**Title:** 
**Domain:** (identity / endpoint / secops / compliance / collaboration)
**Emoji:**
**One-line description:**

---

## Problem Statement

*What enterprise pain point does this agent address? Be specific — what breaks, what costs time, what creates security risk?*

---

## Agent Concept

*What does the agent do in plain English? What questions can a user ask? What does it return?*

---

## Proposed Architecture

- [ ] Declarative Agent (read-only, knowledge-grounded)
- [ ] Power Automate (scheduled/event-triggered)
- [ ] Copilot Studio (multi-turn conversation, approval flows)
- [ ] Hybrid (combination of the above)

**Reason for this choice:**

---

## Data Sources

*Which M365 data sources would this agent query?*
- [ ] Microsoft Graph / Entra ID
- [ ] Microsoft Intune
- [ ] Microsoft Defender XDR
- [ ] Microsoft Sentinel
- [ ] Microsoft Purview
- [ ] SharePoint Online
- [ ] Exchange Online
- [ ] Other: ___

## Estimated Impact / Effort / Risk

| Attribute | Rating |
|---|---|
| Impact | low / medium / high |
| Effort | low / medium / high |
| Risk | low / medium / high |
| Approval required | yes / no |

## Permissions Required

*List the minimum Microsoft Graph API permissions required:*

| Permission | Type | Justification |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

---

## Why This Belongs in the Playbook

*Why would a senior enterprise IT architect find this agent valuable? What is the quantifiable business impact?*

---

## Have You Reviewed Existing Agents?

*Is there an existing agent in the playbook that this duplicates or overlaps with? If so, how does this differ?*

---

## Are You Willing to Write the Full Agent Doc?

- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR with the complete agent file
- [ ] I'd like help developing this further
- [ ] This is an idea only — happy for someone else to develop it
